title: Kurdan Desert
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Kurdan Desert''' covered the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kirdo III/Legends|Kirdo III]] with hot white sand. Every decade or so, the desert received rain causing dormant seeds to flourish and grow. The native [[Kitonak/Legends|Kitonaks]] called this period the [[Great Celebration of Life]].
